title: ROMANTICIST 29pcs BBQ Grill Tool Set for Men Dad, Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Grill Utensils Set, Non-Slip Grilling Accessories Kit with Thermometer, Mats in Aluminum Case for Travel, Outdoor Silver
features: [MOST COMPLETE AND VERSATILE BARBECUE SET]-------Our 29pcs professional grill utensils set includes nearly everything you need for a barbecue. 1* Slotted spatula, 1*Fork, 1*Tongs,1*Basting brush,1*Meat thermometer, 1*Grill brush, 1*Extra cleaning head,2*Shakers for pepper & salt,2*Grill mats, 4*Skewers, 8*Corn holders,1* Stainless steel drinking straw set (includes 4*reusable straws and 1*cleaning brush), 1*Aluminum case for easy storage.

[SUPERIOR QUALITY EXQUISITE CRAFTSMANSHIP]-------Our grilling tools kit are made of food grade stainless steel which is BPA free. Heat resistant and rust resistant. The grill utility set is sturdy durable and long-lasting. No need to worrying about bending, breaking or rusting again. Comfortable elongated handles keep you away from heat with hanging loops design allow them to hang from your grill hooks or grill shelf easily. Dishwasher safe for a quick and easy clean up.

[All IN ONE PACKAGE EASY FOR STORAGE]-------All of the grill gadgets come in a high-grade aluminum case with elastic and Velcro holds for each tool. Which makes it organized and stay together in our little hard metal case without deformation. The portable case is convenient to carrying out for traveling. barbecuing and outside cooking if you're planning on grilling at a family event on park. camping or backyard. Perfect size for picnic and easy to store in RV or kitchen.

[PERFECT PRESENT FOR GRILLING GUYS]-------Whether you are newbie or grill master. You will enjoy using all the accessories in our set and it makes your barbecue easier. Gift it to someone with a new grill or just for yourself to have a complete grilling set.Everything the occasional smoker or griller would need are included. Very cool gift not just for man but for woman, Perfect choice for Birthday, Anniversary, Father's Day, Christmas, Saint Valentine's Day and any other special holidays.

[MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE]-------Your ideal grilling accessories set. Risk-free to choose our professional BBQ tools set. If there are any issues with your purchase, go ahead to contact us. We will offer best customer service and shopping experience for every one of our customers and money-back guarantee for any unsatisfied orders. Do not hesitate to Click the “Add to Cart” button now to start your journey of barbecuing and sharing the moment together with your family and friends.

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year Merchant video ROMANTICIST 29pcs Stainless Steel Grill Tool Set for Men Our 29pcs professional grill set comes with so many accessories for different uses. Each utensil is durable and long-lasting.Your ideal grilling accessories set.Great for gifting or keeping for yourself.You are a better chef than you imagine with professional tools! Must have set for your grilling needs，perfect gift for grilling guys Barbecue fork Heat-resistant heavy-duty grill fork used for skewering large food easily. Meat thermometer(-58℉-572℉) Digital meat thermometer will prevent you from over-cooking your meat. Grill basting brush Silicone brush is heat-resistant without melting, discoloring or shrinking,to spread oils and sauces smoothly on the food. Salt&Pepper shaker Ideal for all kinds of condiment.Such as salt,pepper,suger,spice and so on. Kabob skewer Stainless steel barbecue skewers are reusable and heat-resistant.Perfect for grilling. Corn holder Corn holders used to flip hot corns easily and help to hold hot corns when eating. Stainless steel straws Reusable and sustainable stainless steel straws are perfect replacement of the plastic straws. Grill cleaning brush Cleaning brush with built-in scraper for removing stubborn grease easily.
